# CWE-783: Operator Precedence Logic Error (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-783-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: explicit grouping ensures both authentication and ownership are required.
func EditDocument(c *gin.Context) {
	authenticated := c.GetBool("authenticated")
	isAdmin := c.GetBool("is_admin")
	ownerID := c.GetInt("owner_id")
	docOwner := c.GetInt("doc_owner")
	if !authenticated || !(isAdmin || ownerID == docOwner) {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
